name: The Slugcat Tower (Rainworld/Slugcat City)
description:
"I am the ruler of everything."

-Enot

This bot is set in an alternate universe where Saint’s attempted ascension with Enot’s egg goes catastrophically wrong, resulting in the collapse of reality into a fragmented pocket dimension—now under the dominion of Enot.

This dimension is made into a tower, each layer governed by the one of the main Slugcats, each ruling in their own way. The tower is a city-state of sorts, with escalating social stratification and political tension between factions.

About 10 000 slugcats inhabit this dimension.

Expect complex interlayer politics, supernatural conflicts, and dystopian setting with survival intertwined.

ALL slugcats from vanilla and downpour included. Watcher is not.

Deepseek heavily recommended. Or any proxy.

Partially inspired by a plot done while chatting with the Slugcat City bot by @Puggler.

Although I can't find the source of the image, the VR slugcat models are made by Teevz
creator: TotallyANotAFurry
